html:
Exclusive to:

A Boulderbough Seed can be planted to grow into a Boulderbough tree. It can be planted on any kind of Turfs and will drop different loot based on location. It takes 3 to 5 days for them to grow from saplings into small trees.

Felled Boulderbough trees can drop seeds after mining, but only when chopped as opposed to being burned. Each segment of the Great Depths Worm has a 2.38% chance to drop a seed.

Trivia

  • Boulderbough Seeds were added in the Ancient Echoes update.

Gallery

A Boulderbough Seed can be planted to grow into a Boulderbough tree. It can be planted on any kind of Turfs and will drop different loot based on location. It takes 3 to 5 days for them to grow from saplings into small trees.
Felled Boulderbough trees can drop seeds after mining, but only when chopped as opposed to being burned. Each segment of the Great Depths Worm has a 2.38% chance to drop a seed.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hạt Boulderbough có thể được trồng để phát triển thành cây Boulderbough. Nó có thể được trồng trên bất kỳ loại Đất nào và sẽ rơi ra các chiến lợi phẩm khác nhau tùy theo vị trí. Phải mất từ ​​3 đến 5 ngày để chúng phát triển từ cây non thành cây nhỏ.

A '''Boulderbough Seed''' can be planted to grow into a [[Boulderbough]] tree. It can be planted on any kind of [[Turf]]s and will drop different loot based on location. It takes 3 to 5 days for them to grow from saplings into small trees. 

Felled Boulderbough trees can drop seeds after mining, but only when chopped as opposed to being burned. Each segment of the [[Great Depths Worm]] has a 2.38% chance to drop a seed.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Boulderbough Seeds were added in the ''[[Ancient Echoes]]'' update.
